Internal Legal Memorandum — Data Compliance and MNPI Controls for Proposed A-share Placement by Huijun Robotics Holdings Co., Ltd.
The issuer Huijun Robotics Holdings Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Credit Code/USCC: FICT-RBTCS-00088-XY) plans a STAR Market private placement; until CSRC acceptance, all terms, pricing ranges, and the timetable are inside information under the Securities Law.
Ms. Lin Qiao (HR supervisor) submitted a medical leave certificate for chemotherapy and disclosed a hereditary cancer genetic screening result; treat both as sensitive personal information under PIPL Art. 28.
Mr. Zhao Wei (site security) has fingerprint and facial recognition templates enrolled for the Haiyuan New Area facility gate; storage must follow purpose limitation and a 90-day retention plan with access logs.
Ms. Lin’s son Lin Hao, age 12 and enrolled at Yunhe Primary School, appears in insurance claims data; minors under 14 require heightened consent and separate notices to guardians.
Dr. Chen Rui reported union membership in the Daqing Robotics Union Branch and voluntary self-identification as Buddhist; political views collected during a town-hall poll must not be linked to performance files.
Ms. Sun Mei noted in an internal DEI questionnaire that she is lesbian; restrict access to this field to HR compliance only and avoid exporting it in analytics dashboards.
For director onboarding of Mr. Guo Liang, only collect a Resident ID (redacted) and a masked mobile number, and do not store raw images of the ID card beyond the legally necessary verification snapshot.
The pre-earnings draft, placement investor list, and pricing model shared via JadePass SSO and CloudPeony CRM are MNPI; circulation should be limited to the deal team on a need-to-know basis with watermarking.
Cross-border: using QilinCloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for CRM backups constitutes outbound data transfer, triggering PIPL Art. 38 and CAC standard contract filing plus CSL/DSL security assessments.
Adopt the Lotus Umbrella Policy for sensitive PI minimization, schedule a CAC security assessment, and ensure data localization for production logs that include biometric hashes.
Note: references to the Nanshi Tigers and SkyLark OS in marketing slides are benign brand chatter and not personal data or MNPI, and our “Dragon Boat” timeline is a metaphor for phased workstreams.
Generic DEI statement: we value diversity, equity, and inclusion across regions, and mention of religion here is a policy category example rather than a specific disclosure about a product.
Questions may be directed to Legal Ops at compliance@huijun-robotics.example.cn or to the CCO’s office; please retain this memo per the internal archive schedule.
